summary: Iteration 119 - Dispute Deadlock Fix Testing: All 12 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified working correctly. The deadlock fix when target=organizer is working - counterpart (igaal@hotmail.com) now gets 'participant' role and can submit position. display_state and other_party_name fields working correctly.

backend_pytest: ✅ test_display_state_values_are_valid - display_state is one of valid 5 states
✅ test_display_state_matches_positions - display_state reflects actual position states
frontend_playwright: ✅ Login flow works for both organizer and counterpart
✅ Disputes list page loads and shows dispute cards with display_state badges
✅ Organizer sees 'En attente de Igaal' on list page (other_party_name used)
✅ Counterpart sees 'Votre réponse est attendue' action hint
✅ Dispute detail page loads with correct status badge
✅ Organizer sees 'En attente de la réponse de Igaal' message
✅ Counterpart sees position buttons (can submit position)
✅ Declarant names shown: 'Igaal a déclaré que Test était absent(e)'

context_for_next_testing_agent: Dispute deadlock fix verified. When organizer_user_id == target_user_id (deadlock case), the counterpart who submitted a declaration about the target now gets 'participant' role instead of 'observer'. Key API fields: display_state (waiting_both, waiting_other, arbitration, resolved), other_party_name (first name of opposite party). Organizer (testuser_audit) has already submitted 'confirmed_present' position. Counterpart (igaal) can now submit their position. DO NOT submit position for igaal in automated tests as it would change dispute state permanently.

features_verified.1_display_state_field: ✅ VERIFIED - GET /api/disputes/:id returns display_state (waiting_other in this case)
features_verified.3_deadlock_counterpart_role: ✅ VERIFIED - Counterpart (igaal) gets my_role='participant' in deadlock case
features_verified.7_frontend_list_badges: ✅ VERIFIED - Disputes list shows display_state badges
features_verified.8_frontend_list_action_hints: ✅ VERIFIED - List shows 'En attente de Igaal' for organizer, 'Votre réponse est attendue' for counterpart
features_verified.9_frontend_detail_status: ✅ VERIFIED - Detail page shows 'En attente de réponse' badge
features_verified.10_frontend_detail_message: ✅ VERIFIED - Detail shows 'En attente de la réponse de Igaal' for organizer
features_verified.11_frontend_position_buttons: ✅ VERIFIED - Counterpart sees position buttons (can submit)
features_verified.12_position_endpoint_works: ✅ VERIFIED - POST /api/disputes/:id/position endpoint exists and validates input
